preconditions: Browser session starts in a logged-out state with no active authenticated session.

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Wait for the SPA Home page to finish loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully without redirecting to an authenticated area. The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are visible. No logged-in user name, authenticated identity indicator, or authenticated-only control is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify all approved guest-state controls are visible and enabled
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Inspect the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button.
Attempt to focus and interact with each control.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls are displayed without rendering issues. Each control is enabled, accepts focus or click interaction, and does not appear hidden, blocked, disabled, or read-only.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button opens the Login page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view opens after clicking the Person/Profile button. The login experience becomes visible without duplicate overlays, page corruption, or SPA rendering issues.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to the customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the customer-search page. The destination page loads completely and remains accessible to the guest user without requiring authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to the vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the vehicle-survey page. The vehicle-survey view loads successfully while the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to the survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Site survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the survey page. The survey page loads successfully without redirecting to login or displaying an access denied state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Locate the Home button.
Inspect the Home button state.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible within the shared Home shell and is enabled for interaction without appearing inactive or disabled.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Locate the Back button.
Inspect the Back button state.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible within the Home page shell and is enabled for guest interaction.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Locate the Notification button.
Inspect the Notification button state.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible within the Home page shell and is enabled for guest interaction.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button remains accessible after returning from Login view
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view.
Use browser navigation or SPA navigation to return to the Home page.
Inspect the Person/Profile button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page returns to guest state successfully. The Person/Profile button remains visible and enabled, and no authenticated identity information appears.

testCases.title: Verify Home button interaction preserves guest-state controls
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the Home button while already on the Home page.
Observe the page after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the Home page or reloads the Home SPA state successfully. Guest-state controls remain visible and enabled and the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify sequential navigation across guest-accessible feature buttons
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Navigate to the customer-search page using Customer signup.
Return to the Home page.
Navigate to the vehicle-survey page using Clean survey.
Return to the Home page.
Navigate to the survey page using Site survey.
testCases.expectedResult: Each guest-accessible feature button consistently opens its intended destination page during sequential navigation. Returning to the Home page preserves the guest state and the SPA remains stable throughout the workflow.

testCases.title: Verify direct navigation to the Home URL opens the guest Home state
steps: Open a new browser session without an authenticated user session.
Directly enter http://localhost/washtabui/home in the browser address bar.
Wait for the page to load completely.
testCases.expectedResult: The application opens directly to the guest Home state without redirecting to a restricted or authenticated page. Approved guest controls are visible and no authenticated identity information is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state controls remain actionable after navigating away and returning to Home
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Navigate to the customer-search page using Customer signup.
Use available navigation to return to the Home page.
Click the Clean survey button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page successfully and subsequent guest navigation actions remain functional. The Clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page correctly after returning to Home.
